CustomField.description: Send Study Reminder Text Required within a day before the expected study date
CustomField.formula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Status__c, "With Patient" ), NOT(ISBLANK( Expected_Study_Date__c )), NOT( Study_Reminder_Text_Sent__c ), NOW() > Expected_Study_Date__c - 1, NOW() < Expected_Study_Date__c )
CustomField.label: Send Study Reminder Text Required
